[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Vellar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a former officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. Some time after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he joined [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s forces, serving as the captain of the renegade [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial's]] flagship, the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']].
